name: @ai-dossier/monorepo
description: Dossier monorepo - automation standard for AI agents

scripts.publish:core: cd packages/core && npm run build && npm publish
scripts.publish:cli: cd cli && npm run build && npm publish
scripts.publish:mcp: cd mcp-server && npm run build && npm publish
scripts.publish:all: npm run publish:core && npm run publish:cli && npm run publish:mcp

author: Yuval Dimnik <yuval.dimnik@gmail.com>
